purpose: Comprehensive design system for ShowGroundsLive. Use this file when building new features: apply the exact Tailwind classes and tokens below. Do not invent colors, spacing, or typography.

meta.name: ShowGroundsLive Design System
meta.styleSummary: Modern Organic Professional — clean lines, ample whitespace, serif + sans-serif typography, forest greens and warm accent browns.
meta.stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v3, Vite

structure.layout: Fluid two-column grid (lg:grid-cols-2 or lg:grid-cols-3) for main content; single column on small screens. Use max-w-6xl mx-auto for page container.
structure.container: Generous outer padding: py-8 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8. Content framed, not edge-to-edge.
structure.sections: Separate content into distinct cards or blocks. Use gap-card-gap-y (1.5rem) and gap-card-gap-x (1.25rem) between cards.

hierarchy.principle: Primary title (serif, green) → section/card titles (sans-serif bold) → body (sans-serif regular) → labels (small, warm or secondary).
hierarchy.zones: Header (breadcrumb + title + subtitle) at top; main content in cards; optional footer cards full-width or two-column.

designGuidelines.alignment: Left-align text in cards and sections. Use flex/grid for consistent vertical alignment of adjacent cards.
designGuidelines.spacing: Use 8px multiples. Card internal padding: p-card-padding (1.5rem). Gap between icon and text: gap-3 or gap-4. List items: space-y-3, space-y-4, or space-y-5.
principles: Clarity — each section has one clear purpose.
Consistency — reuse the same Tailwind tokens and component patterns.
Readability — font-body, leading-relaxed for body text, comfortable line height.
Balance — pair heavier blocks (e.g. accent-green) with lighter cards.
Accessibility — semantic HTML, aria-labels where needed, WCAG 2.1 AA contrast.

PageLayout.tailwind: min-h-screen bg-background-primary py-8 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

Header.description: Page header: breadcrumb, main title (serif), optional subtitle.

tailwind.title: font-heading text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-accent-green-dark
tailwind.subtitle: font-body text-base text-text-secondary mt-2 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl

InformationCard.description: White card with optional left border, green circle icon, title, body.

tailwind.article: bg-surface-card rounded-card p-card-padding shadow-card flex gap-4
tailwind.iconWrapper: flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 rounded-icon bg-accent-green flex items-center justify-center text-text-on-dark
tailwind.title: font-body font-bold text-lg text-text-primary mb-2

KeyBenefitsBlock.description: Dark green block, white text, orange-brown checkmark list.

tailwind.title: font-body font-bold text-xl mb-6
tailwind.checkIconWrapper: flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-icon bg-warm-orange-brown-alt flex items-center justify-center

VisionCard.description: Small white card, warm accent icon (no left border), title, body.

CoreCapabilitiesCard.description: Tall card with list of items: green circle icon, title, description per row.

tailwind.section: bg-surface-card rounded-card p-card-padding shadow-card h-full flex flex-col
tailwind.title: font-body font-bold text-xl text-text-primary mb-6
tailwind.iconWrapper: flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-icon bg-accent-green flex items-center justify-center text-text-on-dark

DataExtractedCard.description: Card listing data items with gold circle icons.

tailwind.title: font-body font-bold text-xl text-text-primary mb-4
tailwind.iconWrapper: flex-shrink-0 w-9 h-9 rounded-icon bg-icon-gold flex items-center justify-center text-text-on-dark
tailwind.label: font-body text-text-primary text-sm

WarningInfoCard.description: Info/warning card: warm tan background, accent icon, title, message.

FooterCard.description: Dark green card with white text; icon in semi-transparent white circle.

tailwind.article: bg-accent-green rounded-card p-card-padding text-text-on-dark flex gap-4
tailwind.iconWrapper: flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 rounded-icon bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center text-white
tailwind.title: font-body font-bold text-lg mb-1

Button.description: Primary (green), secondary (warm), or outline. Use for actions.

tailwind.base: font-body font-semibold text-sm px-5 py-2.5 rounded-card transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
tailwind.outline: border-2 border-accent-green text-accent-green-dark hover:bg-accent-green hover:text-text-on-dark focus:ring-accent-green

Input.description: Text input with optional label and error. Use for forms.

tailwind.label: block font-body text-sm font-medium text-text-primary mb-1.5
tailwind.input: w-full font-body text-text-primary border border-border-card rounded-card px-4 py-2.5 placeholder:text-text-secondary focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent-green focus:ring-offset-1 disabled:bg-surface-card-alt disabled:cursor-not-allowed

Badge.description: Small label/tag. Variants: default, warm, green.

tailwind.base: inline-flex font-body text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md

icons.rule: Icons on colored circles: white icon (text-text-on-dark or text-white). Standalone on light card: use text-warm-rust or text-warm-orange-brown.
icons.sizes: Container: w-8 h-8 (small), w-9 h-9, w-10 h-10, w-12 h-12 (large). Icon SVG: w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5 or w-6 h-6 to match.
icons.circles: rounded-icon (full circle). Green: bg-accent-green. Warm check: bg-warm-orange-brown-alt. Gold: bg-icon-gold. Footer: bg-white/20.

layoutPatterns.twoColWideLeft: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-card-gap-x gap-card-gap-y with lg:col-span-2 on left column
layoutPatterns.sectionTitle: font-body font-bold text-xl text-text-primary mb-4 (for standalone section headings above a group of components)

accessibility.semanticHtml: Use header, main, section, article, aside, nav. Card titles: associate with content via aria-labelledby / id.
accessibility.focus: Interactive elements: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent-green focus:ring-offset-1 or focus:ring-offset-2.
accessibility.labels: Form inputs: always pair with label (use Input component). Use aria-invalid and aria-describedby for errors.
accessibility.contrast: Use text-text-primary on light backgrounds; text-text-on-dark on accent-green. Avoid low-contrast combinations.

aiInstructions: When adding a new page: wrap in PageLayout classes; use Header for breadcrumb + title + subtitle; use max-w-6xl mx-auto for content.
When adding a new card or block: reuse an existing component from src/components if it fits; otherwise apply the exact tailwind from this file for that component type.
Never introduce new colors or font families. Use only tokens from this file (Tailwind theme is in tailwind.config.js).
Use design tokens (e.g. bg-accent-green, text-text-primary) not raw hex in class names.
Keep spacing consistent: p-card-padding for card insides, gap-3 or gap-4 for icon+text, space-y-4 for lists.
Section spacing: mb-8 after header; gap-card-gap-y between card groups.
